mapper.select: SELECT dp.id, dp.code, dp.short_name, dp.full_name, ( SELECT MIN(dl.install_dt) FROM dain_logger dl WHERE dl.place_id = dp.id ) AS install_dt FROM dain_place dp WHERE dp.code = #{placeCode}

SELECT dsts.sensor_type_id, dsts.min_gauge, dsts.max_gauge, dsts.criteria_val1, dsts.criteria_val2, dsts.criteria_val3, dst.main_graph_type, dst.sub_graph_type FROM dain_sensor_type_setting dsts JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = dsts.sensor_type_id WHERE dsts.place_id = #{placeId} AND dsts.hidden = false AND dsts.used = true

SELECT dl.id, dl.code, dl.name, dl.location, DATE_FORMAT(dt.first_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS first_at, DATE_FORMAT(dl.uploaded_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_at, dl.uploaded_at - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AS search_at FROM dain_logger dl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT logger_id, MIN(measured_at) AS first_at FROM data_${placeCode} GROUP BY logger_id ) dt ON dl.id = dt.logger_id WHERE dl.place_id = #{placeId} AND dl.used = true ORDER BY dl.code

SELECT d.logger_id, d.sensor_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, ds.name AS sensor_name, ds.sensor_type_id, dst.name AS sensorTypeName, ds.location, ROUND(d.initial_val, 3) AS initial_val, ROUND(d.displace_val, 3) AS displace_val, ROUND(d.changed_val, 3) AS changed_val, dsts.criteria_val1, dsts.group_order FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.logger_id = dl.id JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id AND dsts.place_id = dl.place_id AND dsts.hidden = false AND dsts.place_id = #{placeId} JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = dsts.sensor_type_id JOIN data_${placeCode} d ON d.logger_id = dl.id AND d.sensor_id = ds.id JOIN ( SELECT sensor_id, MAX(measured_at) AS max_measured_at FROM data_${placeCode} GROUP BY sensor_id ) AS ld ON d.sensor_id = ld.sensor_id AND d.measured_at = ld.max_measured_at WHERE dl.place_id = #{placeId} AND dl.cycle_check = true AND ds.used = true AND dst.id != 1 AND d.used = true

SELECT d.logger_id, d.sensor_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, ds.sensor_type_id, dst.name AS sensor_type_name, ds.location, d.measured_at AS last_measured_at, ROUND(d.changed_val, 3) AS changed_val, ROUND(IFNULL(td.today_max_changed_val, 0), 3) AS max_changed_val, IFNULL(td.today_data_count, 0) AS today_data_count, dsts.group_order, ROUND(IFNULL(td_sum.today_changed_sum, 0), 3) AS today_changed_sum, ROUND(IFNULL(total_sum.total_changed_sum, 0), 3) AS total_changed_sum FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.logger_id = dl.id JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id AND dsts.place_id = #{placeId} JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = dsts.sensor_type_id JOIN ( SELECT sensor_id, MAX(measured_at) AS max_measured_at FROM data_${placeCode} GROUP BY sensor_id ) AS ld ON ld.sensor_id = ds.id JOIN data_${placeCode} d ON d.sensor_id = ld.sensor_id AND d.measured_at = ld.max_measured_at LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sensor_id, ROUND(MAX(changed_val), 3) AS today_max_changed_val, COUNT(*) AS today_data_count FROM data_${placeCode} WHERE raw_val != 0 AND measured_at BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY sensor_id ) AS td ON d.sensor_id = td.sensor_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sensor_id, SUM(changed_val) AS today_changed_sum FROM data_${placeCode} WHERE measured_at BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND sensor_id IN ( SELECT id FROM dain_sensor WHERE sensor_type_id = 25 AND logger_id IN (SELECT id FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId}) ) GROUP BY sensor_id ) AS td_sum ON d.sensor_id = td_sum.sensor_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sensor_id, SUM(changed_val) AS total_changed_sum FROM data_${placeCode} WHERE raw_val != 0 AND sensor_id IN ( SELECT id FROM dain_sensor WHERE sensor_type_id = 25 AND logger_id IN (SELECT id FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId}) ) GROUP BY sensor_id ) AS total_sum ON d.sensor_id = total_sum.sensor_id WHERE dl.place_id = #{placeId} AND dl.cycle_check = false AND dsts.hidden = false AND ds.used = true AND dst.id != 1 AND d.used = true

SELECT d.logger_id, d.sensor_id, ds.sensor_type_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, d.measured_at, d.displace_val, d.changed_val, ds.location FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.logger_id = dl.id AND ds.used = true JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN data_${placeCode} d ON d.sensor_id = ds.id WHERE dl.id = #{loggerId} AND dl.cycle_check = true AND d.is_hourly = true AND dsts.hidden = false AND d.measured_at >= #{searchAt} AND d.used = true AND ds.sensor_type_id NOT IN (19, 20, 21) ORDER BY ds.code, d.measured_at

SELECT d.logger_id, d.sensor_id, ds.sensor_type_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, d.measured_at, d.changed_val FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.logger_id = dl.id JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN data_${placeCode} d ON d.sensor_id = ds.id WHERE dl.place_id = #{placeId} AND dl.cycle_check = false AND dsts.hidden = false AND d.measured_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND d.used = true ORDER BY ds.code, d.measured_at

SELECT ds.place_id, dp.code AS place_code, ds.logger_id, dl.code AS logger_code, dl.name AS logger_name, ds.sensor_type_id, dst.name AS sensor_type_name, ds.id AS sensor_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, dsts.group_order FROM dain_place dp JOIN dain_sensor ds ON ds.place_id = dp.id AND ds.used = true JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id AND dsts.place_id = dp.id AND dsts.hidden = false JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = ds.sensor_type_id WHERE dp.code = #{placeCode} AND dl.used = true AND ds.used = true AND dst.id != 1

SELECT ds.place_id, ds.logger_id, ds.sensor_type_id, dst.code AS sensor_type_code, ds.id AS sensor_id, ds.code AS sensor_code, ds.name AS sensor_name, ds.location, dsts.min_gauge, dsts.max_gauge, dsts.criteria_val1, dsts.criteria_val2, dsts.criteria_val3, dsts.interval, dl.cycle_check FROM dain_sensor ds JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.place_id = ds.place_id AND dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id WHERE ds.id = #{sensorId}

SELECT
DATE(measured_at) AS measurement_date,
DATE_FORMAT(measured_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS measured_at,
ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sensor_id = #{sensor.sensorId} THEN ${column} END), 3) AS `${sensor.sensorCode}`
, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sensor_id = #{sensor.sensorId} THEN changed_val END), 3) AS kine
MAX(ROUND(CASE WHEN sensor_id = #{sensor.sensorId} THEN ${column} END, 3)) AS `${sensor.sensorCode}`
, MAX(ROUND(CASE WHEN sensor_id = #{sensor.sensorId} THEN changed_val END, 3)) AS kine
FROM data_${placeCode} WHERE logger_id = #{sensors[0].loggerId} AND measured_at >= #{start} AND measured_at <= #{end} AND used = true
AND MINUTE(measured_at) = 0 AND SECOND(measured_at) = 0
GROUP BY DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measurement_date
GROUP BY measured_at ORDER BY measured_at
DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT DATE(d.measured_at) AS measured_date, ROUND(AVG(d.displace_val), 3) AS avg_displace_val, ROUND(AVG(d.changed_val), 3) AS avg_changed_val, ROUND(SUM(d.changed_val), 3) AS sum_changed_val, MAX(dsts.criteria_val1) AS criteria_val1, MAX(dsts.criteria_val2) AS criteria_val2, MAX(dsts.criteria_val3) AS criteria_val3, ds.sensor_type_id FROM dain_sensor ds JOIN dain_sensor_type_setting dsts ON dsts.place_id = ds.place_id AND dsts.sensor_type_id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN data_${placeCode} d ON d.sensor_id = ds.id WHERE ds.id = #{sensorId} AND d.measured_at >= #{start} AND measured_at <= #{end} AND d.used = true GROUP BY DATE(d.measured_at) ORDER BY measured_date

SELECT DATE(measured_at) AS measurement_date, ROUND(AVG(correction_val), 3) AS avg_correction_val, ROUND(MAX(correction_val), 3) AS max_correction_val, ROUND(AVG(angle_val), 3) AS avg_angle_val, ROUND(MAX(angle_val), 3) AS max_angle_val, ROUND(AVG(displace_val), 3) AS avg_displace_val, ROUND(MAX(displace_val), 3) AS max_displace_val, ROUND(AVG(changed_val), 3) AS avg_changed_val, ROUND(MAX(changed_val), 3) AS max_changed_val, ROUND(MIN(changed_val), 3) AS min_changed_val FROM data_${placeCode} WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND measured_at >= #{start} AND measured_at <= #{end} AND used = true AND raw_val <> 0 GROUP BY DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measurement_date
DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM system_upload_log WHERE run_time < CURDATE()
